items.title: Home Depot Digital Sales Jump 12%: Is Online Edge a Moat?
items.description: HD's digital sales rise 12% in Q2 as AI-driven fulfillment and faster delivery reshape its competitive edge.

items.title: PNK Group Acquires 37 Acres of Land in Connecticut
items.description: Industrial developer PNK Group has acquired the Baker Hollow site in Windsor, CT. The 37-acre property will be developed into two facilities of 300,000 and 120,000 square feet. Located just two miles from Interstate 91, ensuring excellent connectivity for the project.
